chunks.title: Call to Listen
chunks.reason: The psalmist invites all people to hear his wisdom and riddle.

chunks.title: Wealth Cannot Redeem
chunks.reason: An argument explaining that wealth is insufficient to redeem a soul from death.

chunks.title: Fate of the Rich and Upright
chunks.reason: A contrast between the fate of the foolish rich and the redemption of the psalmist.

chunks.title: Warning Against Envy
chunks.reason: A final warning not to fear the rich and a conclusion comparing man to beasts.
